name: Paksiw Na Isda (Boiled Pickled Fish and Vegetables)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Bangus (milkfish) or white fish, dressed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into four slices and place it in a teflon or porcelain coated skillet.
2. Add all other ingredients, except ampalaya and eggplant, to the skillet. Cover and bring to a boil.
3. Let simmer for about 10 minutes, turning the fish once to cook evenly.
4. Transfer the contents to a covered dish and store in the refrigerator for 2 days to "age".
5. Reheat over moderate heat just until heated through before serving.
6. Add ampalaya and eggplant during the last five minutes of cooking.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Aging time: 1-2 days
Serves: 4
